name: Dart
description: Dart pistols fire slow guided spikes that stick to targets and detonate after a short delay. They usually cannot score critical hits and do not deal immediate impact damage, but the tracking makes them dependable against fast-moving or flying enemies. If a shot fails to lock on, it can bounce and still pick up a nearby target, which helps smooth out their slower rhythm.
notes: Some effects that rely on hit timing only count when the dart explodes rather than when it sticks. In rare cases, unusual Hyperion part combinations can create non-elemental E-tech dart or spiker variants that behave more like explosive detonations and may look visually unusual.
